Lumify
Table of Contents

Class Friendship

Namespace
lumify.api.Models.EF
Assembly
lumify.api.dll

A relationship between two users (friend request or accepted friendship). Stored once per user pair using ordered UserLowID/UserHighID keys; the requester/addressee fields record who initiated it. See FriendshipService.

public class Friendship
Inheritance
object
Friendship

Properties

AcceptedAt

When the request was accepted (ISO-8601 string), if applicable.

public string? AcceptedAt { get; set; }

Property Value

string

Addressee

The user who received the request.

public virtual User Addressee { get; set; }

Property Value

User

AddresseeID

The user who received the friend request.

public string AddresseeID { get; set; }

Property Value

string

BlockedAt

When the relationship was blocked (ISO-8601 string), if applicable.

public string? BlockedAt { get; set; }

Property Value

string

CreatedAt

Creation timestamp (ISO-8601 string).

public string CreatedAt { get; set; }

Property Value

string

DeletedAt

Soft-delete timestamp (ISO-8601 string); null while active.

public string? DeletedAt { get; set; }

Property Value

string

ID

Primary key (GUID string).

public string ID { get; set; }

Property Value

string

RejectedAt

When the request was rejected (ISO-8601 string), if applicable.

public string? RejectedAt { get; set; }

Property Value

string

Requester

The user who sent the request.

public virtual User Requester { get; set; }

Property Value

User

RequesterID

The user who sent the friend request.

public string RequesterID { get; set; }

Property Value

string

Status

Relationship status (see FriendshipStatus: Pending, Accepted, …).

public int Status { get; set; }

Property Value

int

UpdatedAt

Last-update timestamp (ISO-8601 string).

public string UpdatedAt { get; set; }

Property Value

string

UserHigh

The higher user of the pair.

public virtual User UserHigh { get; set; }

Property Value

User

UserHighID

The lexicographically higher user ID of the pair (part of the unique key).

public string UserHighID { get; set; }

Property Value

string

UserLow

The lower user of the pair.

public virtual User UserLow { get; set; }

Property Value

User

UserLowID

The lexicographically lower user ID of the pair (part of the unique key).

public string UserLowID { get; set; }
